title: Ingest endpoint: POST a Notion URL, store the whole page as one chunk
userStory: As a user, I want to POST a Notion URL and have that page loaded into the database so that I can test ingest on a single page.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /ingest {url} orchestrates fetch_page -> upsert source (kind='notion_page', title, raw_text, path) -> store the WHOLE page as one chunk (position 0) -> embed -> insert
Re-posting the same URL wipe-replaces: existing chunks for that source are deleted and re-created (idempotent, always current)
Response returns the source id and chunk count (1)
Fetch or embed errors return a clear 4xx/5xx and leave no partial write
Verify: POST the Target-role URL, then query the DB for exactly one sources row and one chunks row with a non-null embedding; POST again and confirm still exactly one chunk
